---
title: "Samuel Taylor Coleridge"
---

## Samuel Taylor Coleridge

**Dates:** 1772-1834

### Description

poet

### Biography

Grandfather of Christabel Rose Coleridge.  CMY was not related to him, but to his sister-in-law Frances Duke (Taylor) Coleridge (1760-1838), wife of his brother James (1759-1836).  Frances Duke Coleridge was first cousin of CMY\'s grandfather the Rev. Duke Yonge, their mothers being sisters called Duke.

### Letters

- [To Lady Leconfield, May 26th [1899]](../letters/3407_To_Lady_Leconfield.html)
- Letter from April 18th 1885
- Letter from Jan 2d [1885] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
